feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BW/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP BW/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA, Ontologien und digitale Souveränität – Erfahrungen mit offenen Wissensgraphen?
entry.content:
ich beschäftige mich aktuell mit der Frage, wie sich SAP‑Prozesse in mittelständischen Unternehmen (50–500 MA) durch Ontologien und Wissensgraphen optimieren lassen – insbesondere im Hinblick auf digitale Souveränität und Vendor‑Unabhängigkeit.

Ausgangspunkt ist eine Beobachtung aus mehreren Projekten: Viele Unternehmen haben SAP‑Workloads in die Cloud (AWS/Azure) verlagert, ohne die Prozesslogik vorher zu optimieren. Das führt häufig zu deutlich höheren Betriebskosten, ohne dass die zugrunde liegenden Prozessprobleme gelöst wurden.

Mit der zunehmenden Nutzung von KI‑gestützten Ansätzen (z. B. SAP Joule, SAP Graph/Knowledge Graph, Palantir Foundry) rückt jetzt die Frage in den Vordergrund, wie Prozesslogik modelliert und langfristig kontrolliert wird.

Das Beispiel Merck zeigt, dass Ontologie‑basierte Optimierung erhebliche Effizienzgewinne ermöglichen kann. Gleichzeitig entsteht bei proprietären Plattformen schnell eine starke Abhängigkeit.

Daher meine Fragen an die Community:

1. Welche Erfahrungen gibt es mit Ontologie‑basierten Ansätzen auf offenen W3C‑Standards (RDF, OWL, SPARQL) im SAP‑Umfeld? Insbesondere im Zusammenspiel mit S/4HANA, BTP, Integration Suite oder Data & Analytics.

2. Gibt es praxistaugliche Wege, Prozesslogik über offene Wissensgraphen abzubilden, ohne in proprietäre Plattformen zu geraten? Zielgruppe: mittelgroße SAP‑Landschaften.

3. Hat jemand Erfahrungen mit europäischen Anbietern wie eccenca oder ähnlichen Lösungen, die auf offenen Standards basieren?

Ich freue mich über technische Einblicke, Architektur‑Erfahrungen oder Hinweise auf Projekte, in denen offene Ontologie‑Ansätze erfolgreich eingesetzt wurden.

entry.title: Not able to generate DVM report for BW4HANA system in Solution Manager
entry.content:
We were looking for DVM report however it seems that it is no more possible for BW4HANA system.

While we continue with self service DVM cloud-based service delivery step says that DVM data is sent to Data Volume Management - SAP for Me  which doesnt exits anymore.

entry.title: How to properly add S_RS_AUTH to single role in PFCG for BW/4HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm learning SAP BW/4HANA authorization concept.

What are the exact steps to manually add
S_RS_AUTH authorization object in a
single role via PFCG?

Is it: Edit → Manual → enter S_RS_AUTH → fill BIAUTH field → Generate?

Thank you

entry.title: 0TCTVINTV Info-object is not available to add as display attribute in Characteristic target IOBJ.
entry.content: 0TCTVINTV Info-object is not available to add as display attribute in B4HANA.

entry.title: 0TCTVINTV is unavailable to add as display attribute in target Char IOBJ
entry.content:
• Open your target characteristic InfoObject in BW Modeling Tools (Eclipse).
  • Navigate to the

entry.title: Query definition is required for each query embedded in web template
entry.content: In BW/4HANA SAP removed dependency on NetWeaver Portal & KM (Knowledge Management). Hence KM-based documentation is no longer supported.  How to maintain the query documentation in BW4HANA world

entry.title: ODQ_TQ_JOB automatically restarting after stopping - How to identify the source PC or scheduler?
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am facing an issue in SAP BW regarding the background job ODQ_TQ_JOB.

Whenever I stop/cancel the job from SM37, it automatically starts again within 2–30 seconds.

Job Details:

- Job Name: ODQ_TQ_JOB
- Program: ODQ_TQ_WORKER
- Related task in logs: RSPC_RECENT_RUN_CACHE

System keeps showing:
- Task RSPC_RECENT_RUN_CACHE will be restarted in 30 seconds.
- Internal scheduled.

What I observed:

- Even after manually stopping the job, SAP recreates and runs it automatically.
- It looks like the job is being triggered by:
- Process Chain,
- Event,
- Scheduler,
- or some BW/ODQ background mechanism.

My Requirement:

I want to identify:

1. Which process chain, scheduler, or event is restarting this job?
2. How can I trace the exact source?
3. What is the correct way to stop this job permanently (if required)?

Transactions checked:
- SM37
- SM36
But I am still unable to identify the exact trigger source.

Log Snapshot:

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

 

Can you please help me as soon as possible what i exactly need to do?

Thanks & Regards.

entry.title: Not all requests are displayed in transaction RSMNG
entry.content:
I attach a document.

Regards,

entry.title: Composite Provider in Compatibility Mode (MPRO_COMPA_MODE)
entry.content:
Hallo,

wir haben festgestellt das einige unserer großen Composite Provider im Compatibility Mode (RSOHCPR.MPRO_COMPA_MODE) angelegt wurden. Dieser verhindert nun neue Erweiterungen.

Gibt es eine Möglichkeit die Objekte wieder in den "normalen" Modus zu versetzen bzw. was ist der Auslöser für diesen Modus?

Da wir weit über 100 Queries auf einem dieser Objekte haben, ist eine Neuanlage leider kaum möglich.

entry.title: Request for Instructions to Verify PaPM Application Users in Production and Development
entry.content:
Hello Team,

I would like to request assistance on how to check how many users are using the SAP PaPM application in both the Production and Development environments.

Could you please provide step-by-step instructions on how to verify:

  • The number of users who have access to PaPM, and
  • The number of users who are actively using the PaPM application?

This information will help us understand usage patterns across environments and support our operational needs.

Thank you for your help.
Please let me know if any additional details are needed.

Kind regards,
Sarfaraz

entry.title: How to send data extracts and replications from SAP S4 to MS Fabrics
entry.content:
Hello Mates,

Good day!

How to integrate and send data extracts and replications from SAP S4 HANA Private Cloud(RISE) to MS Fabrics via Standalone SAP SLT DMIS2020? Is this considered an strategic solution to use this option quickly?

Only 2 option comes in to my mind as optimal one is SAP datasphere and another is Standalone SAP SLT.

Please require your kind inputs. Appreciate it!

 

Thanks and Regards,

Rajesh PS

entry.title: We need to uninstall Oracle java in BW system
entry.content:
Hi Team,

At the time of BW installation We installed oracle java in our BW environment but in S4 environment there is no oracle java. 

We need to uninstall it or we can install the open JDK java

Could you please provide your output.

 

Regards,

Alok Behera

entry.title: Gatewayb builder ODATA for odp throws error
entry.content:
We get an error while trying to publish and ODP Source via Gateway Builder as ODATA

Process to repeat

  • SEGW
  • create project
  • right click on Datamodel of new project
  • select "Redifine" - "ODP Extraction"
  • enter RFC Destination: DB4CLNT500, ODP Context: BW BW/4HANA, ODP Name: VP0FSACT1$F
  • click add ODP
  • click Next
  • enter empty field Service Regsitration - Description: "TEST"
  • Error appears: Make an entry in mandatory field "Description"  Message No. 00278

    Process can not be finished

Can anybody help?

entry.title: Use of more than one reusable filter
entry.content:
Dear Sir or Madam,
we were asked by our business department whether there is a possibility to use more than one reusable filter within one query. This would give them great flexibility in defining highly specific reports.

entry.title: Enhanced Master Data Update in SAP BW4HANA 2.0
entry.content:
Enhance Master Data Update: SAP BW4HANA 2.0 new feature and key benefits

To accelerate and stabilize master data loads in SAP BW/4HANA, enable the Enhanced Master Data Update feature. It converts InfoObject structures to behave like Advanced DataStore Objects (aDSOs), allowing you to stage data in inbound tables, run parallel processes, execute delta updates, and roll back requests.

Key Technical Benefits
  • Parallel Loading: Large volumes of master data or data from multiple sources can be loaded concurrently.
  • aDSO-like Architecture: The system generates an Inbound table, Active table, and Change Log for both attributes and texts.
  • Mixed Case Support: Delta mechanisms and parallel processing are fully supported for both time-independent and time-dependent attributes/texts.

Classic way to load the master data.

New way to load the data.

This enables parallel loading of data. To do this, the attribute receives additional tables. It then has a structure like a DataStore object with an inbound table and a change log. The enhanced master data update is an advantage if you want to load a large quantity of data or to load data from multiple DataSources simultaneously. You can also load deltas from one InfoObject into another InfoObject.

In transaction RSDMD_SETTINGS, you can make settings for processing requests.

Hope this helps!!

Regards,

Arvind

entry.title: ZSD_MAG_INVOICE_IN form does not exist in BRF+
entry.content:
In new upgreaded version of SAP S4 HANA 2025, we are facing an error as some templates are missing where as same are present in the system in SFP t-code and in older version as well. 
Replication steps-->
SPRO--> cross application components--> output control--> define rules for determination of Master form Template--> click on any template it says " Form XXXX does not exist" where as in SFP tcode it shows form

entry.title: InfoObject > Master Data Maintenance 가능 "미 작동"
entry.content:
Master Data Maintenance 시 하기 에러 발생 합니다.

Title: ErrorMessage: App could not be opened either due to an incorrect SAP Fiori launchpad configuration or a missing role assignment.Details: {  "info": "Failed to resolve navigation target \"#BWInfoObject-maintainMasterData?ignoreNavigationTargetInSearch=X&iobjName=0PLANT\". This is most likely caused by an incorrect SAP Fiori launchpad content configuration or by a missing role assignment.",  "fixedShellHash": "#BWInfoObject-maintainMasterData?ignoreNavigationTargetInSearch=X&iobjName=0PLANT",  "technicalMessage": "Could not resolve navigation target"}

entry.title: Navigational attributes not showing
entry.content:
Issue in Composite Provider (CP) while adding Navigational attributes.

We have added a navigational attribute ZC_ARE1 in the CP in the BWD system and activated the CP captured in TR and moved to BWP system. Please find the screen shot below.

CP screen with navigational attribute ZC_ARE1.

entry.title: Creating a BW workspace using a composite provider
entry.content:
I want to create a BW workspace using a composite provider that joins two ADSOs, but I encountered an issue.  I am working in BW4 and want to use a composite provider as my main provider in the workspace settings of RSWSP. The composite provider is a join of two ADSOs.  I have tried multiple ways to get around this.  First was to create a Union node in the composite directly above a Join and assign it to the main provider of RSWSP.  Only then can you see it in the Central Providers section.  Second was to do a Joule suggested, and that was to drag in the Composite provider in the Central Providers section along with the two ADSOs, but the composite provider is not available unless it is in the Settings for main provider section first.  Even there, you cannot add additional ADSOs once the Settings for main provider has been established.  Please see attached.

 

I should not have to create a new model.  The Composite model already exists.  I am just trying to use what is already built, not reconstruct what is already built.  We need this tool so we can allow our Power Users to use the Workspace Designer Query functionality.  We would assign this capability as a self-service capability for power users, that could help generate queries for our infoconsumber base.  Giving them access to Eclipse is not the ideal state. 

 

Steps;

Original Scenario cannot be used as a main provider on the Setting Tab of RSWSP

Workaround #1, tried to put a Union as the top of the new Scenario.

Workspace designer does allow it in the Settings for main provider:

However, when looking at this in central providers, it remains in Error:

Attempting work around #2, tried to add ADSOs after establishing Settings for main provider.

Please also note that there is no “Composite” provider to select from in the Central Providers area.

entry.title: Compressing (Activating) a DataMart ADSO dont behave as expected
entry.content:
We have a datamart ADSO that is getting additive deltas. The key figures are all set to summation, yet when we activate a data load to compress the data to reduce the space it takes up, it seems it is overwriting data and not summing the data.

I compared two identical ADSO's, one setup as standard and the other is the datamart. They were identical until I compressed the first load. After compression the values were not the same anymore. The two ADSO's now differ with 37 million ZAR, but we only expected a record count drop and not a value difference.

RECORDMODE is not mapped - as per Joule this is the expected outcome and the correct setting:

RECORDMODE Value

Meaning

Impact on Data Mart ADSO

' ' (blank)

After Image — the status after a change or addition

The standard additive record. Correct for Data Mart ADSO when the source provides additive deltas. If all records arrive as after images (e.g., because RECORDMODE is not mapped), the ADSO will SUM all of them — which may produce inco
